description: Google Programmable Search Engine lets developers retrieve web or image search results from a configured custom search engine in JSON format. The service uses a Programmable Search Engine ID to scope searches and is being transitioned toward other Google search products.
summary: Programmable Search Engine on customsearch.googleapis.com exposes two REST search surfaces: the Custom Search JSON API and the site-restricted variant, both authenticated with a Google API key passed as the `key` query parameter.

surfaces.name: Custom Search Site Restricted JSON API
